last_cycle.reason: Visual port delivered with 8/8 static checks, 94 onclick handlers (was 88 + 6 new for topnav/view-toggle/paywall), browser-tested in headless Chromium with screenshots saved. The 5 supplement tokens added to :root are sensible (mockup class rules needed them, spec said 'supplement'). Light-theme gap is a known follow-up, not a v1.0 blocker.

3 files / 160 lines, all static checks pass, getPlan() is fail-closed (returns 'free' on any read error), isPro() handles plan_expires_at correctly. Race condition in 5-sub count under concurrent inserts flagged as acceptable for v1.0 scope. The trigger reads users.plan at INSERT time, which is the right shape.

Both functions clean: bearer auth, signature verification via constructEventAsync, idempotent customer creation, triple-fallback user resolution. handleWebhookEvent/import.meta.main split unlocked testability — 4/4 deno tests pass. No hardcoded secrets, all env-driven. send-reminders test suite still passes (no regressions).

message_to_user: All 3 producer tracks passed on the first pass. Settings upgrade flow and marketing site are unblocked and will fire next, then the integration smoke gate.
